Container.Name: HealthTrack
Container.Overview: Self-hosted personal health tracker. Track medications, conditions, allergies, labs, vitals, procedures, vaccines, appointments and notes for yourself and your dependents — all data stays in a single SQLite database and uploads folder under /data on your server. No cloud services required. The first registered user becomes the instance admin; set SIGNUPS_ENABLED to false afterwards to close registration. Optional integrations (each enabled only when its keys are set): Anthropic API key for AI health summaries, natural-language queries and lab/vaccine PDF parsing; Google OAuth for "Sign in with Google"; Oura for ring data sync. Back up /data to back up everything.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the HealthTrack web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: All application state: SQLite database (healthtrack.db), uploaded lab PDFs (uploads/) and auto-generated secrets (keys/). Back up this folder to back up everything.

Config.Name: APP_URL
Config.Description: The URL users browse to — required for login/auth callbacks to work. Use your server's address and the mapped port, e.g. http://TOWER_IP:3000 (or your reverse-proxy HTTPS URL if you use one).

Config.Name: SIGNUPS_ENABLED
Config.Description: Allow new account registration. The first registered user becomes admin — set this to false afterwards to close signups on your instance.

Config.Name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. Anthropic API key — enables AI features: health summaries, natural-language health queries, medication interaction checks and lab/vaccine PDF parsing. AI features are hidden when unset.

Config.Name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Optional. Google OAuth client ID — enables the 'Sign in with Google' button. In the Google Cloud console, add this authorized redirect URI: APP_URL/api/auth/callback/google

Config.Name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional. Google OAuth client secret (pairs with GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID).

Config.Name: OURA_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Optional. Oura OAuth client ID — enables Oura Ring sync (sleep, heart rate, activity). In the Oura developer portal, set the redirect URI to: APP_URL/api/oura/callback

Config.Name: OURA_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional. Oura OAuth client secret (pairs with OURA_CLIENT_ID).

Config.Name: AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: Advanced. Session signing secret. Leave empty — one is auto-generated into /data/keys on first start. Set only if you want to manage it yourself.

Config.Name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
Config.Description: Advanced. Key used to encrypt stored OAuth tokens (Oura). Leave empty — one is auto-generated into /data/keys on first start. Set only if you want to manage it yourself.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns files under /data (Unraid default: 99 / nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns files under /data (Unraid default: 100 / users).
